root.sql:
SELECT sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr , ( select account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where account_id = account_tr ) as account_trname , sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_owner as membership_no , sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_name as membername , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_owner)as member_group , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_owner)as member_group_name , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_docno as loan_contract_no , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.item_amount as principal_balance , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
, ( select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code
from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code
where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_docno and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code ) as loan_code
, ( select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc
from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code
where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_docno and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code ) as loan_code_desc ,sc_fin_vourcher_head.entry_id FROM sc_fin_vourcher_head , sc_fin_vourcher_detail , sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
WHERE sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.vourcher_no and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_owner and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_group = 'LONADJ' and sc_fin_vourcher_head.journal_date = (current_date)::date
/*WHERE*/
ORDER BY sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_id , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.account_tr , sc_fin_vourcher_detail.ref_docno
